rationale: No conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §54.221, which governs tuition rates for employees of UT System agreement partners.
quote: Sec. 54.221. THE UNIVERSITY OF TEXAS SYSTEM; SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPMENT, MANAGEMENT, AND TRANSFER.
_note: Rule text concerns tuition/fees for UT System agreement employees; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption.
